ai_summary: Ariya Hansen is an experienced caregiver for her three-year-old nonverbal brother on the spectrum, demonstrating patience and a love for children's diverse personalities. She is available most days except Tuesday and Wednesday afternoons and focuses on creating a safe, fun learning environment where kids can thrive.
